headline: 2026 NFL draft order: 32 first-round picks, Raiders at No. 1
description: The Raiders, Jets and Cardinals hold the top three picks in the 2026 NFL draft. See the rest of the order -- plus each team's top need.

headline: 2026 NFL mock draft: Top 10 pick predictions off free agency
description: How has NFL free agency affected 2026 draft plans? Here are Field Yates' updated predictions for picks Nos. 1-10 after the first wave of deals.

headline: Saints, LB Kaden Elliss reunite on 3-year deal, sources say
description: The Saints have agreed to a three-year, $33 million deal with linebacker Kaden Elliss, according to NFL Network. Originally drafted by New Orleans, Elliss has spent the past three seasons with the Falcons.

headline: Sources: Jets get their QB, trade with Raiders for Geno Smith
description: The Jets are trading for the Raiders' Geno Smith, reuniting the quarterback with the team that drafted him in 2013, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Tuesday.
